ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player for account communication */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the gaming platform */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the player logged into the platform */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the player across all games */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* List of achievements the player has unlocked */,
  "friends_list" TEXT /* List of player IDs of the player's friends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., MOBA, FPS) */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the developer who created the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher who published the game */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms on which the game is available (e.g., PC, PS4, Xbox) */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game by players */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players who have played the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stats entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of games won */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of games lost */,
  "winrate" REAL /* Win rate percentage */,
  "kills" REAL /* Total kills made by the player */,
  "deaths" REAL /* Total deaths of the player */,
  "assists" REAL /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "gpm" REAL /* Gold per minute earned by the player */,
  "xpm" REAL /* Experience per minute gained by the player */,
  "total_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes the player has played the game */,
  "highest_kills" INTEGER /* Highest number of kills achieved in a single game */,
  "highest_deaths" INTEGER /* Highest number of deaths in a single game */,
  "highest_assists" INTEGER /* Highest number of assists in a single game */,
  "best_game_mode" TEXT /* Best game mode (e.g., deathmatch, team deathmatch) the player excels in */,
  "total_matches_won_vs_ai" INTEGER /* Number of matches won against AI opponents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who played the session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game played */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the session (e.g., deathmatch, team deathmatch) */,
  "map" TEXT /* Map on which the session was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was on (if applicable) */,
  "ai_opponents" INTEGER /* Number of AI opponents in the session */,
  "player_count" INTEGER /* Total number of players in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game for which the leaderboard is relevant */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player on the leaderboard */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode for which the leaderboard is relevant */,
  "map" TEXT /* Map for which the leaderboard is relevant */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season or time period for which the leaderboard is relevant */,
  "points_breakdown" TEXT /* Detailed breakdown of the points (e.g., kills, assists, objectives) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player profile */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio or description of the player */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's avatar image */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the player */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the player's social media profiles */,
  "favorite_games" TEXT /* List of the player's favorite games */,
  "favorite_characters" TEXT /* List of the player's favorite characters */,
  "custom_badges" TEXT /* List of custom badges the player has earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_profiles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the event occurred */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., kill, assist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "player_ids" TEXT /* List of player IDs involved in the event */,
  "team_ids" TEXT /* List of team IDs involved in the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event in the game (e.g., coordinates) */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)
